rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §19.0051 governs Windham School District educational programs for incarcerated persons. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote:
Sec. 19.0051. EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS. (a) The Windham School District shall develop and provide an educational program that includes the curriculum requirements for a high school diploma under Section 28.025 or a course of instruction that prepares the person for the high school equivalency examination to each person confined or imprisoned in the department who is not a high school graduate and is:
(1) younger than 18 years of age; or
(2) eligible to receive special education services under Subchapter A, Chapter 29, and younger than 22 years of age.
_note: No conflict: proposed homestead exemption change has no nexus to Windham School District educational programming statute.
